nasb.text: Their possessions and settlements were Bethel with its towns, and to the east Naaran, and to the west Gezer with its towns, and Shechem with its towns as far as Ayyah with its towns,

esv.text: Their possessions and settlements were Bethel and its towns, and to the east Naaran, and to the west Gezer and its towns, Shechem and its towns, and Ayyah and its towns;

cnv.text: 以法蓮人的地業和居住的地方，是伯特利和屬於伯特利的村莊，東邊有拿蘭，西邊有基色和屬於基色的村莊；示劍和屬於示劍的村莊，直到迦薩和屬於迦薩的村莊。

ccb.text: 以法莲人的地业和住处包括伯特利及其四围的村庄、东部的拿兰、西部的基色及其四围的村庄、示剑及其四围的村庄，远至迦萨及其四围的村庄。
